BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Talbot於1361年出生在英國賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot30歲，母親Pernel Butler29歲。他於1381年與Ankaret le Strange在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年9月7日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Talbot was born in 1361, in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, was 30 and his mother, Pernel Butler, was 29. He married Ankaret le Strange in 1381, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 7 September 1396, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Talbot est né en 1361, à Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Pernel Butler, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Ankaret le Strange en 1381, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1396, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Talbot(이)가 1361년 영국 허퍼드실르 치레스월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Pernel Butler(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1381년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Ankaret le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 9월 7일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Talbot nasceu em 1361, em Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Pernel Butler, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Ankaret le Strange em 1381, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1396, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Ca: роеилесь, роеилесь де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Talbot родился в 1361 г. в местности экклесвалл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Pernel Butler, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Ankaret le Strange в 1381 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 7 сентября 1396 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

Se casó con Ankaret le Strange en 1381, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1396, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
